name: Crowdin Open Source Program
description: Free localization platform for open source projects with an OSI-approved license, including translation memory, glossaries, 700+ integrations, and GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket sync.

perks.title: Free Localization Platform
perks.description: Full access to Crowdin's localization platform at no cost for qualifying open source projects.

perks.title: Translation Memory & Glossaries
perks.description: Built-in translation memory and glossaries to maintain consistency across your project's translations.

perks.title: 700+ Integrations
perks.description: Integrations with GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, Azure Repos, and 700+ other tools, plus CLI and API access.

eligibility: Licensed under an approved OSI open source license.
Source code must be publicly available for download.
No commercial products related to the project.
You must be the project lead.
Project must have been active for a minimum period.
applicationProcess: Submit the open source project setup request form on Crowdin's website.
Crowdin reviews the application against their eligibility criteria.
